query: SELECT v.id, v.nome, v.gestorId, v.ativo, g.userId, u.name as gestorNome FROM volantes v LEFT JOIN gestores g ON v.gestorId = g.id LEFT JOIN users u ON g.userId = u.id ORDER BY v.gestorId, v.nome;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rEtBRZHWZUfGJS.3b07a01772f8 --database 3c9MozLH35e233uWy5WDtH --execute SELECT v.id, v.nome, v.gestorId, v.ativo, g.userId, u.name as gestorNome FROM volantes v LEFT JOIN gestores g ON v.gestorId = g.id LEFT JOIN users u ON g.userId = u.id ORDER BY v.gestorId, v.nome;
